allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/wardrobe_schema.json'\)\); print\('top keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('example items count:', len\(d['example_wardrobe']['items']\)\); import json as j; print\(j.dumps\(d['example_wardrobe']['items'][0],indent=2\)\); print\('empty:', d['empty_wardrobe']\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; import os; load_dotenv\(\); print\('GROQ_API_KEY set' if os.environ.get\('GROQ_API_KEY'\) else 'GROQ_API_KEY MISSING'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import app; print\('app builds:', app.build_interface\(\) is not None\)")
